# BluFin Capital Advisory

BluFin Capital Advisory PLC is an ECMA-licensed Securities Investment Advisor in Ethiopia, providing ethical, insightful, and compliant investment and transaction advisory services.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/): Overview of BluFin Capital Advisory and its mission for Ethiopia's capital market
- [About Us](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/about): Firm overview, vision, mission, and values
- [Company Profile](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/about/company-profile): Legal details, ownership, services, and structure
- [Governance](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/about/governance): Organogram, reporting lines, and board committees
- [Board of Directors](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/about/team/board): Board members and profiles
- [Appointed Representatives](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/about/team/appointed): CEO, Chief Compliance Officer, and Chief Research Officer
- [What We Do](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/what-we-do): Advisory practice areas
- [Listing & Capital Markets](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/what-we-do/listing-capital-markets): Listing and capital markets solutions
- [Corporate Finance](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/what-we-do/corporate-finance): Corporate finance and advisory
- [M&A and Deals](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/what-we-do/ma-deals): Mergers, acquisitions, and transaction advisory
- [Insights](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/insights): Research, commentary, and announcements
- [Track Record](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/track-record): Selected advisory transactions
- [Careers](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/careers): Working at BluFin
- [Contact](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/contact): Request a consultation

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs
- [Robots](https://blufincapitaladvisory.com/robots.txt): Crawler guidance
